## Hen displacement

```{r}
#| label: hen displacement table

hen_displacement_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "hen_displacement_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::hen_displacement(
  hhold_df = hen_displacement_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  animal_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$hen_displacement_animal_var),
  cock_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$hen_displacement_cock_val),
  hen_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$hen_displacement_hen_val),
  pullet_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$hen_displacement_pullet_val),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)
```
